decision_summary: The bounded runtime release is ready because the key claims are evidence-backed and support-facing controls are explicit.

launch_roles.responsibility: Final go or no-go decision and staged rollout coordination
Confirm cockpit, orchestration, intake, and memory behaviors are coherent
Confirm internal guidance for blocked routes and provenance warnings

claim_readiness.claim: The runtime foundation materially reduces PM reconstruction work.
The release remains bounded to internal PM operating value rather than broader autonomous PM claims.

checks.name: Runtime benchmark movement
checks.notes: Benchmark movement is materially stronger than the V2 baseline.

checks.name: Runtime scenario proof
checks.notes: Runtime scenario coverage passed with provenance handling folded into the normal ready-state path.

checks.name: Trust and compliance boundary
checks.notes: Internal-only learning-loop artifacts remain distinct from PM-facing product claims.
